_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of ongoing and future operations.
reference_document_element_description: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-020 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.507), TF-A-004 (TF, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.265). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [future, knowledge, ongoing, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.879, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of ongoing and future operations." and "Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.512 > STS 0.265 (gap +0.247). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [future, knowledge, ongoing, operations]. WIDAI terms: [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts].
